/.title: Standard Method Group | Operations Consulting for Small Business | Pinellas County, FL
/.description: Standard Method Group helps small businesses in trades, construction, marine contracting, and property management get their operations running right. Free 30-minute discovery call.

/how-we-work.title: How We Work | Standard Method Group
/how-we-work.description: From discovery call to working engagement — here's what happens when you reach out to Standard Method Group. No contracts, no jargon, just results.

/who-we-help.title: Who We Help | Standard Method Group
/who-we-help.description: If your business runs on repetitive processes and manual handoffs, Standard Method Group can help. See what that looks like in trades, marine, property management, and more.

/about.title: About | Standard Method Group
/about.description: Standard Method Group is a one-person operations consultancy founded by Dan Rockhold in Pinellas County, FL. Local, hands-on, and built for small business.

/contact.title: Contact | Standard Method Group
/contact.description: Start a conversation with Standard Method Group. Free 30-minute discovery call. Email or fill out the form.

/calculator.title: Operations Cost Calculator | Standard Method Group
/calculator.description: See how much time and money your business spends on repetitive admin work — and what you could get back. Free calculator from Standard Method Group.
